description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, circular objects are visible near the center of the frame in the upper right quadrant. This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B15
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025, consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date displayed in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, circular objects are visible near the center of the frame in the upper right quadrant.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The document presents a single, low-quality, grainy, low-light optical image with no described behavior or kinematics for the 'two small, dark, circular objects.' There are no corroborating sensors or witnesses beyond the operator. This lack of detail and quality strongly supports a mundane explanation, placing it in the 85-100 range for a single, low-quality image with no corroborating evidence.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B15 - Page 1

[redacted]

[Image: A grainy, low-light photograph featuring a white crosshair overlay. Two small, dark, circular objects are visible near the center-right of the crosshair. There are three blacked-out redaction bars on the left side and three blacked-out redaction bars on the right side.]

12/31/99 18:20:22
cover_up_reasoning: The document contains both a general '[redacted]' section at the top and specific black-bar redactions directly adjacent to the image itself. These redactions appear to obscure contextual information rather than just personal identifiers, indicating a moderate level of information withholding beyond routine FOIA boilerplate, even for a single-page document.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常现象解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份未识别异常现象（UAP）报告，该报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过了编辑和删节。未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。图像中显示的日期（12/31/99）因系统日期/时间未设置而有误。该单色图像呈现颗粒状纹理，并带有简化的中心十字线。画面中心右上象限可见两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体。
reported_object_description_zh: 两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件呈现了一张单一的、低质量、颗粒状、低光照光学图像，未描述“两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体”的行为或运动学特征。除操作员外，没有其他佐证传感器或目击者。这种细节和质量的缺乏有力地支持了世俗解释，对于一张没有佐证证据的单一低质量图像，其可解释性范围为85-100。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件顶部包含一个通用的“[已删节]”部分，且图像本身旁边有具体的黑条删节。这些删节似乎是为了掩盖上下文信息，而非仅仅是个人身份信息，这表明即使对于单页文件，信息保留程度也超出了常规的《信息自由法》模板，属于中等程度。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO
Report includes a still image from a U.S. military system
Operator could not identify the UAP
Two small, dark, circular objects are visible in the image
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像
图像经过了编辑和删节
图像中可见两个小型、黑暗的圆形物体
bust_explanations: Lens flare or camera artifact, given the low-light, grainy nature of the photograph and the circular appearance of the objects.
Bird, bat, or insect at close range, appearing as small, dark, out-of-focus objects due to proximity to the lens in low light.
Distant aircraft or drone, which could appear as small, dark, circular objects, especially if out of focus or at a significant distance.
bust_explanations_zh: 鉴于照片的低光照、颗粒状性质以及物体的圆形外观，可能是镜头眩光或相机伪影。
在低光照下，由于靠近镜头，近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫可能呈现为小型、黑暗、失焦的物体。
远距离的飞机或无人机，尤其是在失焦或距离较远的情况下，可能呈现为小型、黑暗的圆形物体。
cover_up_indicators: General '[redacted]' at the top of the page
Black-bar redactions obscuring context around the image
cover_up_indicators_zh: 页面顶部的通用“[已删节]”
图像周围的黑条删节掩盖了上下文信息
